title: Document TUI Package Layout Changes
description: Update any developer-facing documentation that references `src/agent_takt/tui.py` or `tests/test_tui.py`, or explicitly confirm that no repository docs required updates because the refactor preserved the external API.
acceptance_criteria: Any repository documentation that names the old monolithic TUI module or test file is updated to the package layout.
If no such references exist, the bead records that no documentation changes were necessary.
Documentation continues to describe the preserved `run_tui` import surface accurately.
block_reason: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B-cc199121

src/agent_takt/tui/state.py and src/agent_takt/tui/actions.py were modified/created by sibling beads in the same feature tree. These do not conflict with test file edits.
Low. actions.py is a new file. state.py changes are internal (method bodies replaced by delegation). render.py and __init__.py are untouched. No expected_files overlaps with sibling beads.
No file-scope conflicts expected. `app.py` is a new file; `__init__.py` only has symbol re-exports changed.
None. This bead only reorganizes test files — no production code was touched.
None. The deleted `tests/test_tui.py` was only referenced by spec/bead metadata (historical) and not imported by any other test or source module.
